title: Water Canteens
description: Adds several tiers of canteens for the mod "Thirst was Taken"
body:
Adds several water canteens for the mod Thirst Was Taken.

Leather Tier: holds 6 bottles worth of water
Iron/Copper Tier: holds 12 bottles worth of water
Gold Tier: holds 36 bottles worth of water
Diamond Tier: holds 48 bottles worth of water
Netherite Tier: holds 64 bottles worth of water
Dragon Tier: holds 64 bottles of water and automatically filters them to an acceptable level.
